question: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $140 in May?

fed_expectations: Jerome Powell out as Fed Chair by May 14, 2026? → YES=50%

causal_chains: US shale production rises → oil price ceiling effect
Oil above $90 → inflation pressure → Fed hawkish → BTC falls
Oil below $60 → deflation risk → Fed dovish → BTC rallies
Oil price spike → airline/shipping stocks fall → consumer discretionary falls
